subtopics.title: What's in the Box
subtopics.content:
#### Player-Count Audit
- **Supported counts** — 1 to 4 players.
- **Scaling** — Minion surge count scales by player count.
- **Solo mode** — Supported; control multiple mice.

#### Characters (6 Mice Heroes)
- **Collin** — Prince turned mouse; warrior with sword abilities.
- **Maginos** — Court wizard; casts spells using cheese.
- **Tilda** — Healer; restores health and buffs allies.
- **Nez** — Tinker; crafts equipment and uses ranged attacks.
- **Filch** — Scamp; stealthy thief with surprise attacks.
- **Lily** — Archer; ranged attacker with bow abilities.

#### Miniatures
- **Hero miniatures** — 6 detailed mouse hero miniatures.
- **Minion miniatures** — Rats, roaches, centipedes, spider, and cat (Brodie) miniatures.

#### Tiles and Tokens
- **Room tiles** — Double-sided modular tiles forming the castle map.
- **Search tokens** — Tokens placed in rooms to discover items.
- **Cheese tokens** — Shared cheese wheel and individual cheese tracking.
- **Page marker** — Tracks the chapter timer on the page track.

#### Cards
- **Ability cards** — Unique ability cards for each mouse hero.
- **Search cards** — Items discovered by searching rooms.
- **Encounter cards** — Events drawn when the page marker advances.
- **Story cards** — Narrative cards for each chapter.
- **Initiative cards** — Determine turn order for heroes and minions.

#### Dice
- **Custom dice** — Dice with sword, shield, bow, and cheese symbols.

subtopics.title: Board Layout
subtopics.content:
#### Chapter Setup
1. **Read chapter intro** — Read the story card narrative for the current chapter.
2. **Select room tiles** — Set out the room tiles indicated by the chapter setup.
3. **Place starting tile** — Put the first room tile in the center of the table.
4. **Place tokens** — Add search tokens, mouse holes, and other markers as indicated.
5. **Place minions** — Set up starting enemy minions as described in the chapter.
6. **Page track** — Set the page marker to the starting position on the page track.
7. **Cheese wheel** — Set the minion cheese wheel to 0.

#### Room Exploration
- **New rooms** — As mice move through mouse holes or doorways, place new room tiles.
- **Tile connections** — Tiles connect through specific entry points described in the chapter.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
#### Character Selection
- **Choose mice** — Each player selects a mouse hero (some chapters require specific mice).
- **Ability cards** — Take your mouse's starting ability cards.
- **Equipment** — Equip any items carried over from previous chapters (if applicable).
- **Health** — Set health to your mouse's maximum.

--- 1 Player ---
- **Control multiple** — Control 2 or more mice to have a functional party.

--- 2 Players ---
- **2 mice each** — Each player may control 2 mice, or control 1 each.

--- 3-4 Players ---
- **1 mouse each** — Each player typically controls 1 mouse.

subtopics.title: Starting the Game
subtopics.content:
#### Beginning a Chapter
- **Story narrative** — Read the chapter introduction from the storybook.
- **Initiative order** — Determine turn order using initiative cards.
- **Page track** — The page track starts at the position indicated and advances when cheese fills the wheel.
- **Objective** — Each chapter has a specific story objective to complete.
- **Begin play** — Start with the first mouse hero's turn in initiative order.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
#### Round Structure
1. **Determine initiative** — Arrange initiative cards for heroes and minion groups.
2. **Take turns** — Heroes and minion groups alternate based on initiative order.
3. **End of round** — Check for end-of-round effects and story triggers.

#### Hero Turn
- **Move** — Move up to your speed value in spaces.
- **Action** — Perform 1 action: attack, search, explore, use ability, or share items.
- **Free actions** — Equip items, use certain abilities.
- **Scurry** — Instead of a normal action, move additional spaces equal to your speed.

#### Minion Turn
- **AI behavior** — Minions move toward and attack the nearest mouse hero.
- **Surge** — When the minion cheese wheel fills, a surge occurs: new minions appear and the page advances.

subtopics.title: Actions & Options
subtopics.content:
#### Combat
- **Melee attack** — Roll dice equal to your attack value; each sword symbol is 1 hit.
- **Ranged attack** — Roll dice; each bow symbol is 1 hit (ranged weapons use bow faces).
- **Defense** — Defender rolls dice; each shield symbol blocks 1 hit.
- **Cheese symbols** — Any cheese rolled adds to the roller's cheese total (heroes keep theirs; minion cheese goes to the cheese wheel).

#### Searching
- **Search action** — On a space with a search token, draw a search card to find items or story elements.
- **Equip** — Found items can be equipped immediately or given to another mouse in the same space.
- **Item limits** — Each mouse can carry a limited number of items.

#### Special Abilities
- **Cheese cost** — Many abilities cost cheese tokens from your personal supply.
- **Ability cards** — Each mouse has unique abilities powered by cheese.
- **Sharing cheese** — Mice on the same space can freely share cheese tokens.

#### Exploration
- **Move through exits** — Moving through a mouse hole or doorway reveals the next room tile.
- **New minions** — The chapter instructions indicate which minions appear in newly explored rooms.

subtopics.title: Special Mechanics
subtopics.content:
#### Cheese Wheel (Timer Mechanic)
- **Minion cheese** — When minions roll cheese symbols, cheese is added to the shared cheese wheel.
- **Wheel fills** — When the cheese wheel reaches its limit, it resets and a minion surge occurs.
- **Page advances** — Each surge advances the page marker on the page track.
- **Chapter failure** — If the page marker reaches the end of the track before the objective is met, the chapter is lost.

#### Mouse Capture
- **Knocked out** — A mouse reduced to 0 health is captured (not eliminated).
- **Captured state** — Captured mice are placed on the chapter page and miss turns.
- **Rescue** — Other mice can rescue captured allies by reaching specific locations or completing tasks.
- **All captured** — If all mice are captured simultaneously, the chapter is lost.

#### Cheese as Currency
- **Dual purpose** — Cheese rolled on dice during attacks and defense is also the fuel for special abilities.
- **Hero cheese** — Heroes collect cheese they roll personally.
- **Spending cheese** — Spend cheese to activate ability cards and special powers.

#### Campaign Persistence
- **Items carry over** — Found items persist between chapters.
- **Story continuity** — Chapter outcomes affect narrative but all chapters are replayable.
- **Level-up** — Mice can gain new ability cards between chapters.

subtopics.title: Endgame & Scoring
subtopics.content:
#### Chapter Victory
- **Complete objective** — Each chapter has a story objective (rescue an ally, reach a location, defeat a boss, etc.).
- **Victory narrative** — Read the victory text from the storybook.

#### Chapter Defeat
- **Page track exhausted** — The page marker reaches the final position.
- **All captured** — All mice are captured at the same time.
- **Retry** — Failed chapters can be replayed immediately.

#### Campaign Completion
- **11 chapters** — The campaign consists of 11 story chapters.
- **Narrative resolution** — The campaign concludes with the final chapter's story outcome.
- **No competitive scoring** — Fully cooperative; success is completing the story.

subtopics.title: Opening Priorities
subtopics.content:
- **Move with purpose** — The page track creates time pressure; do not waste turns exploring unnecessarily.
- **Search early** — Items found through searching can significantly boost your party's combat effectiveness.
- **Stick together** — Mice can share cheese and items when on the same space; splitting up is risky.
- **Manage cheese** — Accumulate cheese early for critical ability uses in boss encounters.
- **Know your roles** — Tilda heals, Maginos casts, Collin tanks, Nez supports from range.

subtopics.title: Common Mistakes
subtopics.content:
- **Ignoring the page track** — The timer is the real threat; unnecessary fights advance the cheese wheel.
- **Wasting cheese on minor abilities** — Save cheese for critical moments and boss fights.
- **Splitting the party** — Isolated mice are vulnerable and cannot share cheese or items.
- **Fighting every minion** — Sometimes running past enemies is better than engaging.
- **Forgetting defense rolls** — Defenders always roll dice; shield symbols block damage.

subtopics.title: Key Decisions
subtopics.content:
#### Decision 1: Fight vs Flight
- **Engage enemies** — Clear rooms to explore safely and collect search tokens.
- **Run past** — Save time on the page track by avoiding unnecessary combat.

#### Decision 2: Cheese Spending
- **Use abilities now** — Spend cheese on abilities to handle current threats.
- **Save for later** — Bank cheese for powerful abilities needed in the chapter climax.

#### Decision 3: Search vs Move
- **Search rooms** — Searching finds items that help in current and future chapters.
- **Keep moving** — Advancing toward the objective respects the time pressure of the page track.
